hypothesis: An LLM-driven multi-tool agent that uses short- and long-term memory, periodic table and knowledge-base retrieval to propose compositions, coupled with DiffCSP for structure estimation and iComFormer for property evaluation, will produce compositions whose generated structures more frequently meet specified target formation energies (±0.25 eV/atom) and have higher compositional validity, uniqueness, and novelty than compositions generated by tool-free LLM variants or MatterGen.
